title: Chapter 54
content:
Chapter 54

"Yahn~"

"Aahnn~~"

"Oohh~~~"

A chorus of moans rang throughout the bathroom, which was almost four times in size of our previous one. The bath pool was enough to be considered half of a classic pool in size.

But did any of that detail matter against a simple fact that I had the tastiest of foods in front of my face and I could eat them without caring for anything.

Watermelons, grapes, and strawberries. The combination of those tastes was amazing on its own, but when combined with the sounds of pleasure elicited by the ones my tongue was invading, it was a scene straight out of heaven.

I would have given my left arm if I could just get myself hard, but alas, that was not possible. So, I did what I was doing for the moment and took enjoyment in it.

"Hng~ Hueh~ Ohhnn~~"

Martha's moans were like small coos that aroused one's sadistic side.

"Hnnn~~ Aaahh~~"

Sandra's moans were a bit mature and enticing.

The difference between them was barely three years, but there was a stark difference between their moans. One evoked one's pride, while one tempted one to bully the other.

However, the moans that turned me on the most were...

"Aaoo~~ Hyaannn~~ Ooooohh~~~"

Rayla's moans were like a pure definition of sensual pleasure. It wasn't just her mature charm or the fact that she was this body's mother, but it was because of the simple depraved pleasure I derived from putting her underneath her daughters while she moaned in heat in unison with them.

Turned out that sister-sister play wasn't as arousing as mother-daughter play. Not to mention when there were two daughters.

Slurp~

Slurp~

I kept slurping their juices, the one that provided warmth, the one that provided sourness and sweetness, and the one that tingled my tongue with her unique flavor.

The mixture of the flavors only aroused me even more and motivated me to go deeper and deeper until finally...

"Aaahhh!!!"

Martha was the first one to cum, as always. She was the weakest to stimulate out of all of them.

Her limp body put pressure on Sandra, who was close to erupting as well, but Sandra managed to keep her legs strong and remained on her own weight, not putting any pressure on her mother, who was the next one to give out.

"HHNH!!!"

With a strong grunt, Rayla arched her waist upwards and bowed her head down in the position of a cat stretching, and came on my face. I collected most of her juices while bathing my face with the rest that I couldn't.

Her body gave out as well, but unfortunately, like her younger daughter, there was no muscled warrior underneath her to support her.

And then the said muscled warrior. Sandra's muscles didn't get in the way of her softness. Her hips and ass were the softest parts on her body, unlike Martha who was tiny and tight.

Sandra, however, defeated the rest of her female family members in terms of stamina. Her stamina was top-notch. Where Martha or Rayla would cum at the very least ten times during one session, she would only cum twice or thrice. Of course, that was only without the additional support of mana. If I were to add mana, she would surely be erupting like lava.

"MMMnnhh~~ Yes~~~ Right the~~re, Jack!"

Sandra had learned the art of moaning.

Although she didn't know what she was supposed to be saying, she had learned to convey her feelings in words, as she was the only one who could bear my assault without going muddleheaded.

She would sometimes convey her feelings during sex, which was in contradiction to the free-use category, but also added a hint of reality to it. That was another disadvantage of free use, by the way. There was no particular verbal response from the female.

Sandra, however, defied that norm and properly conveyed whatever she felt and however she felt it. Where she felt and how much more she wanted it.

"Are you close, sister?" I asked.

"Yes! I amnnnhh~~~"

Sandra moaned as I penetrated her pussy with my tongue. It was for about another three minutes that she finally came. Even with my stats and stamina, my tongue was tried by the time she came. Her stamina was truly something.

But that also made it all the more enjoyable.

Sandra, unlike her younger sister or mother, didn't fall limp but stood up after a few seconds and picked up Sandra, who was still unconscious. "I'll take Martha to go to sleep, brother. You take Mother to her bed."

Oh, I definitely would take her to bed.

"Sure, sister," I replied and kissed her good night, which she welcomed. Once she was gone, I picked up Rayla, who was sleeping comfortably in an uncomfortable position. Her stamina was really shit. Even after training her for so long, her stamina hadn't improved much.

I carried her to her room, where Julian was busy with a quill and some papers.

"Oh? What happened to her?" Julian curiously inquired, to which I replied, "She was just a little tired, so she slept during the bath."

"Ah. Was it another one of your massages? They always wear her out." Julian remarked as if he understood everything.

I nodded with a smile before I asked, "What are you doing?"

"Well, if we want to use your plan, we need to make sure to keep it small so we don't raise a lot of suspicion," Julian replied. It was my plan to be the only ones who brought in the hunt. Well, as things were going, we wouldn't need to do that for much longer.

I nodded and said, "Well, I'll leave you to it. Is it all right if Mother sleeps with me tonight?"

"Why?" Julian asked with an eyebrow corked.

"I'm tired, so I just thought I'd sleep with her. Her chest is very soft and keeps me warm." I simply replied.

My reply was ridiculous, and had I been in my real world, it would have earned me a lashing, but it didn't do anything right now. Julian nodded and replied, "Very well. But don't make a habit of it. You're a grown man now."

I nodded at his stern reply, but laughed inwardly at the fact that he was upset about the wrong thing. But, I guess that was the norm in this world.

"Sure, Father," I replied and took Rayla as she was still in my arms to my room. I gently laid her down on the bed and covered her naked body. There were still about three hours before midnight, so I'll let her catch her breath until then. After all, she would have to go through a hellish twenty minutes soon.

It didn't matter if it was pleasure or not. It would still be hellish for her. For me, though, it would be heavenly and nothing but heavenly.

On that note, I was going to do something else tonight.

[Mana container x100]

I had successfully made one hundred mana containers that each held ten thousand MP, so that would be just a million mana, but it was enough for my next step.

[SC 1,008,911]

I finally had one million shop coins. I had to sell a lot of things in my inventory, such as mana crystals and more, to make up for the rest I couldn't get from hunting.

Still, the reason I required a million shop coins was to purchase a skill. A simple skill with infinite possibilities.

[Creation]

[Tier: SSS]

[Effect: Make your desires come true if you can in exchange for something]

[Failure in creating something would result in the destruction of the created product, and no recovery would be possible]

[Cost: 1,000,000 SC]

[Mastery: 0%]

[Current rank: F]

[Higher-ranked items cannot be made unless mastery has been increased to the appropriate rank]

[The cost requirement of an F rank item is 100 MP]

[As the skill mastery increases, the chances of failure would decrease sharply]

The reason why such a high-ranking skill was so cheap was that this skill failed ninety-nine out of one hundred times. Of course, the materials in exchange were lost as well. The materials in this case would be mana. Basically, I would be creating something from mana. It required expert control and a high level of concentration.

But for me, this skill was a blessing. This was my fifth life in total, my fourth life in a supernatural world where I had to use this skill. The phrase 'Practice makes everything perfect' applied perfectly here.

The only problem was the newbie mistake. Just because the system said one couldn't make a high rank item, it wasn't true. One could make a high-ranking item if they tried; however, the chances of failure increased by a hundred percent each rank.

However, what would happen to the mastery bar if I were successful in making an E rank item?

Well, there was only one way to answer that question. Let us begin.
